content.description:
A range slider widget for use in app-pages.

The slider writes its numeric value to shared page state via `stateKey`, enabling other widgets (like buttons) to read it.

### Content Fields

- `label` (string) - Slider label displayed to the left
- `min` (number) - Minimum value (default: 0)
- `max` (number) - Maximum value (default: 100)
- `step` (number) - Step increment (default: 1)
- `stateKey` (string) - Key to write the value to in page state
- `defaultValue` (number) - Initial value (default: min)
